authorization_boundary.reason: introducing fields changes the source payload/schema contract and must be human-authorized

blocked_reason: required values are absent from source payload and current evidence surface cannot classify missing-label pressure without them
decision_ready_reason: each proposed field declares role, owner, producer, blocked loop, blocked decision, requirement, null behavior, provenance, allowed mutation scope, forbidden actions, and requested decision

proposed_introductions.allowed_mutation_scope: add field emission and provenance only; no source semantic reinterpretation
proposed_introductions.current_source_surface: repaired evidence overlay exposes key and absence reason, but source payload does not emit value
proposed_introductions.expected_future_source_surface: taxonomy_gap_source_payload emits this field or emits explicit non-applicable/null reason with provenance
proposed_introductions.field_role: identifies the specific label that was missing
proposed_introductions.provenance_requirement: producer must attach source_trace_ref and source_receipt_ref for emitted value or explicit null reason
proposed_introductions.required_for: distinguishing one missing-label gap from another
proposed_introductions.why_required: taxonomy-gap missing-label pressure cannot be classified without identifying which label is missing
